MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHARLES LI Motion for Order Vacating the Request for Dismissal with Prejudice Filed On Or About August 20, 2007 by Defendant Demas Yan. Appearances: Bao-Quan P. Pham, Esq. Attorney at Law, (408) 275-6701 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. Plaintiff's Counsel gave notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. There are no other appearances. Hearing held and argued. Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied, unreasonable delay in bringing motion.
